summary: Completed e2e testing of WIP Orders and Link Measurement features. All features working correctly: Styling page 'Add to WIP' button saves order and navigates to WIP Orders page, WIP Orders page shows order table with tabs (WIP, Placed Order, Staff Order), Link Measurement page shows product selection and measurement fields with allowance inputs.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting (span inside tbody/tr) - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: WIPOrdersPage.jsx has HTML nesting warnings (span inside tbody) - likely from React rendering wrapper elements. Consider using React.Fragment instead of span for dynamic content.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple WIP orders via API tests and UI flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All WIP Orders and Link Measurement features tested and working: 1) Styling Page - 'Add to WIP' button (data-testid='add-to-wip-btn') creates order via POST /api/orders and navigates to /reseller/orders. 2) WIP Orders Page - Shows order table with columns (Order ID, Date, Details, Product Name, Place, Copy, Action), tabs work (WIP/Placed Order/Staff Order via data-testid='tab-wip/placed/staff'), Link Measurement button navigates to /reseller/link-measurement. 3) Link Measurement Page - Product selection checkboxes, measurement fields (BICEPS, CHEST, JACKET LENGTH, SHOULDERS, SLEEVE LENGTH), body measurement from customer profile (read-only), allowance input modifies final measurement, Needed/Not Needed toggle works. 4) Backend APIs - POST /api/orders, GET /api/orders, PATCH /api/orders/{id}/link-measurement, PATCH /api/orders/{id}/status all working correctly.

styling_add_to_wip.details: 'Add to WIP' button creates order via POST /api/orders and navigates to WIP Orders page with toast 'Saved to Work in Progress!'

wip_orders_table.details: Table shows Order ID (format: 'Rahul -- XXXXXX'), Date, Details, Product Name, Place button, Copy button, Action buttons

wip_orders_tabs.details: WIP, Placed Order, Staff Order tabs work correctly - switching tabs filters orders by status

link_measurement_navigation.details: Clicking 'Link Measurement' navigates to /reseller/link-measurement with order and customer state

link_measurement_product_selection.details: Product checkboxes (Jacket, 2 pc Suit, 3 pc Suit, etc.) filter visible measurement fields

link_measurement_body_values.details: Body measurement values loaded from customer profile (e.g., BICEPS: 15, CHEST: 42)

link_measurement_allowance.details: Allowance input modifies Final Measurement (Body + Allowance = Final)

link_measurement_toggle.details: Needed/Not Needed toggle works - toggles measurement inclusion

api_create_order.details: POST /api/orders creates WIP order with customer_id, items, status='wip'

api_list_orders.details: GET /api/orders with customer_id and status filters returns correct orders

api_link_measurement.details: PATCH /api/orders/{id}/link-measurement links measurements with allowances to order item

api_update_status.details: PATCH /api/orders/{id}/status updates order status (wip -> placed -> staff)

api_copy_order.details: POST /api/orders/{id}/copy creates copy of order with new ID and status='wip'
